<div class="entry-content">
	
<figure class="wp-block-image size-full"><img fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" width="768" height="432" src="https://winepost.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/image.png" alt="Winepost" class="wp-image-9" srcset="https://winepost.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/image.png 768w, https://winepost.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/image-300x169.png 300w" sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 768px" /></figure>



<p class="has-text-align-center"><em>High quality wines at affordable prices, delivered to you</em></p>



<p class="has-text-align-center">Perfect as a gift or to get for yourself as a monthly subscription</p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center">Closing Down Sale!</h2>



<p>It is with a heavy heart that we have decided to close down Winepost. We have loved sharing our favourite wines with you over the last three years, but increasing prices and decreasing time mean that we will be focusing elsewhere going forward. Thank you for all your support – please take advantage of the amazing deals on our remaining stock!</p>
